commands.statement:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Aggregate" ( -- 집계 ID "AggregateID" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_Aggregate" PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
-- 입력일자 "CreateDate" INTEGER NOT NULL,
-- 입력시간 "CreateHour" INTEGER NOT NULL,
-- 프로젝트 ID "ProjectID" TEXT NOT NULL,
-- 거래 ID "TransactionID" TEXT NOT NULL,
-- 기능 ID "FeatureID" TEXT NOT NULL,
-- 요청수 "RequestCount" INTEGER NULL,
-- 응답수 "ResponseCount" INTEGER NULL,
-- 오류수 "ErrorCount" INTEGER NULL,
-- 최근요청일시 "LatelyRequestAt" TEXT NULL,
-- 최근응답일시 "LatelyResponseAt" TEXT NULL,
-- 최근응답구분 "Acknowledge" TEXT NULL,
-- 외부 저장소로 이관 여부 "IsMoved" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
-- 집계 유니크 키 CONSTRAINT "UK_Aggregate" UNIQUE ("CreateDate", "CreateHour", "ProjectID", "TransactionID", "FeatureID") );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ErrorDetail" ( -- 에러상세 NO "ErrorDetailNo" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_ErrorDetail" PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
-- 프로젝트 ID "ProjectID" TEXT NULL,
-- 거래 ID "TransactionID" TEXT NULL,
-- 기능 ID "FeatureID" TEXT NULL,
-- 거래 글로벌 ID "GlobalID" TEXT NULL,
-- 사용자 ID "UserID" TEXT NULL,
-- 로그 구분 "LogType" TEXT NULL,
-- 입력일시 "CreatedAt" TEXT NULL );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "AggregateBackupStatus" ( -- 상태 ID(싱글톤) "StatusID" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_AggregateBackupStatus" PRIMARY KEY CHECK("StatusID" = 1),
-- 마지막 이관 행 ID "LastMovedId" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
-- 마지막 갱신 일시 "UpdatedAt" TEXT NULL );
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO AggregateBackupStatus ( StatusID , LastMovedId , UpdatedAt ) VALUES ( 1 , 0 , strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', 'NOW', 'localtime') );

statement.desc: 당일 및 금주 거래 요청/응답/오류 집계 조회

commands.statement: SELECT 'TODAY' AS DateType , IFNULL(SUM(AG.RequestCount), 0) AS RequestCount , IFNULL(SUM(AG.ResponseCount), 0) AS ResponseCount , IFNULL(SUM(AG.ErrorCount), 0) AS ErrorCount FROM Aggregate AG WHERE AG.CreateDate = @RequestDate UNION SELECT 'WEEK' AS DateType , IFNULL(SUM(AG.RequestCount), 0) AS RequestCount , IFNULL(SUM(AG.ResponseCount), 0) AS ResponseCount , IFNULL(SUM(AG.ErrorCount), 0) AS ErrorCount FROM Aggregate AG WHERE AG.CreateDate BETWEEN @FirstDateOfWeek AND @LastDateOfWeek;

statement.desc: 최근 7일 일시별 요청수, 오류수 합계 조회

commands.statement: SELECT AG.ProjectID , AG.TransactionID , AG.FeatureID , AG.RequestCount , AG.ResponseCount , AG.ErrorCount , strftime('%H:%M:%S', AG.LatelyRequestAt) || ' / ' || strftime('%H:%M:%S', AG.LatelyResponseAt) AS RequestResponseTime , strftime('%s', AG.LatelyResponseAt) - strftime('%s', AG.LatelyRequestAt) AS DurationSecond FROM Aggregate AG WHERE AG.CreateDate = @CreateDate AND AG.CreateHour = @CreateHour ORDER BY 7 DESC;

SELECT ED.ProjectID , ED.TransactionID , ED.FeatureID , ED.GlobalID , ED.UserID , ED.LogType , strftime('%H:%M:%S', ED.CreatedAt) AS CreatedAt FROM ErrorDetail ED WHERE strftime('%Y%m%d-%H', ED.CreatedAt) = (@CreateDate || '-' || @CreateHour) ORDER BY 7 DESC;

SELECT AG.AggregateID , AG.CreateDate , AG.CreateHour , AG.ProjectID , AG.TransactionID , AG.FeatureID , AG.RequestCount , AG.ResponseCount , AG.ErrorCount , AG.LatelyRequestAt , AG.LatelyResponseAt , AG.Acknowledge FROM Aggregate AG WHERE AG.IsMoved = 0 AND AG.AggregateID > @LastMovedId ORDER BY AG.AggregateID ASC LIMIT @TakeCount;

statement.desc: 거래 요청/응답/오류 집계 정보 입력 또는 변경

commands.statement: INSERT INTO Aggregate ( CreateDate , CreateHour , ProjectID , TransactionID , FeatureID , RequestCount , ResponseCount , ErrorCount , LatelyRequestAt , LatelyResponseAt , Acknowledge , IsMoved ) VALUES ( @CreateDate , @CreateHour , @ProjectID , @TransactionID , @FeatureID , 1 , 0 , 0 , @LatelyRequestAt , @LatelyResponseAt , @Acknowledge , 0 ) ON CONFLICT(CreateDate, CreateHour, ProjectID, TransactionID, FeatureID) DO UPDATE SET RequestCount = IFNULL(Aggregate.RequestCount, 0) + 1 , ResponseCount = IFNULL(Aggregate.ResponseCount, 0) , ErrorCount = IFNULL(Aggregate.ErrorCount, 0) , LatelyRequestAt = excluded.LatelyRequestAt , LatelyResponseAt = excluded.LatelyResponseAt , Acknowledge = excluded.Acknowledge , IsMoved = 0;

UPDATE Aggregate SET ResponseCount = (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(ResponseCount), 0) + 1 FROM Aggregate S WHERE S.CreateDate = @CreateDate AND S.CreateHour = @CreateHour AND S.ProjectID = @ProjectID AND S.TransactionID = @TransactionID AND S.FeatureID = @FeatureID) , LatelyResponseAt = @LatelyResponseAt , Acknowledge = @Acknowledge , IsMoved = 0 WHERE CreateDate = @CreateDate AND CreateHour = @CreateHour AND ProjectID = @ProjectID AND TransactionID = @TransactionID AND FeatureID = @FeatureID;

UPDATE Aggregate SET ErrorCount = (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(ErrorCount), 0) + 1 FROM Aggregate S WHERE S.CreateDate = @CreateDate AND S.CreateHour = @CreateHour AND S.ProjectID = @ProjectID AND S.TransactionID = @TransactionID AND S.FeatureID = @FeatureID) , LatelyResponseAt = @LatelyResponseAt , Acknowledge = @Acknowledge , IsMoved = 0 WHERE CreateDate = @CreateDate AND CreateHour = @CreateHour AND ProjectID = @ProjectID AND TransactionID = @TransactionID AND FeatureID = @FeatureID;

statement.desc: 이관 완료 집계 행 이동 처리

commands.statement: UPDATE Aggregate SET IsMoved = 1 WHERE AggregateID <= @LastMovedId AND IsMoved = 0;

INSERT INTO AggregateBackupStatus ( StatusID , LastMovedId , UpdatedAt ) VALUES ( 1 , @LastMovedId , strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', 'NOW', 'localtime') ) ON CONFLICT(StatusID) DO UPDATE SET LastMovedId = CASE WHEN excluded.LastMovedId > AggregateBackupStatus.LastMovedId THEN excluded.LastMovedId ELSE AggregateBackupStatus.LastMovedId END , UpdatedAt = excluded.UpdatedAt;

statement.desc: 이관 완료된 오래된 집계 행 삭제

commands.statement: DELETE FROM Aggregate WHERE IsMoved = 1 AND AggregateID <= @LastMovedId AND CreateDate < @DeleteBeforeDate;

INSERT INTO ErrorDetail ( ProjectID , TransactionID , FeatureID , GlobalID , UserID , LogType , CreatedAt ) VALUES ( @ProjectID , @TransactionID , @FeatureID , @GlobalID , @UserID , @LogType , @CreatedAt );
